challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description: Zatim, unutar vašeg elementa main, dodajte element h1 sa tekstom Parent Teacher Conference Form i klasama title i center.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Parent Teacher Conference Form</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="./styles.css" />
</head>

<body>
  <main class="container">
    
  </main>
</body>

</html>

tests.text: Your h1 element should have the text Parent Teacher Conference Form.
Your h1 element should have the classes title and center.
Your h1 element should be inside the main element.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Parent Teacher Conference Form

Please fill out the form below to help schedule your parent-teacher conference.

Student Information
Parent/Guardian Information
Preferred Contact Method
Additional Notes
